title: Banchi Carries the Summons
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on banchi carries the summons, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Banchi Carries the Summons. Baroque Works’ senior agents are summoned while the Straw Hats and Vivi continue moving through the desert toward the heart of Alabasta’s crisis. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: I sent Banchi to pick them up so they should arrive here by... Early morning tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Doublefinger
dialogue.text: I never would've imagined you'd be Ms. Double- Finger, Paula!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Haha... Well, I never said I "wasn't," did I?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: How are you sending out my orders to the billions stationed at Namohana?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: I figured waiting for the Unlockies to come back would delay our schedule,

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: So I went with some- thing else.

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: I sent out the orders using the "Muffler Rumners"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This is the first time I've ever seen.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Baroque Works Immediate Delivery Service "Muffler Runners"

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Then everything is progressing on time as planned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now let's go look for this leader! Where is he again?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We still have to walk Northwest across the desert for half a day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We just crossed the Sandra River and docked here at the green city, Elumalu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The green city? But there isn't anything green out here...

summary: This part develops banchi carries the summons and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
